title: Vežba 60

answers.answer: This laptop is more powerful than that one.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica koristi komparativ stepen (comparative) (more powerful), a ne superlativ.

answers.answer: She is a very skilled developer in her team.
This is the fastest processor on the market.
This software is easier to use than the old version.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica koristi komparativ stepen (comparative) (easier), ali superlativen stepen (superlative) poredi tri ili više stvari.

instructions: Vežba nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation:
Superlativni pridev (superlativ) upoređuje tri ili više stvari kako bi pokazao najviši ili najniži stepen.

Koristite -est za kratke prideve (poput fastest), a koristite most za duge prideve (poput most efficient). Neki pridevi imaju neobične tipove (poput best). Uverite se da koristite the pre visokonivo/naprednih prideva.
